parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gnote.user_state (user_id, state)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.callback_query?.from?.id || $json.message?.from?.id }},
  'waiting_for_topic_name'
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id)
DO UPDATE SET 
  state = 'waiting_for_topic_name',
  created_at = NOW();

parameters.text:
={{
  $json.is_reserved_name
    ? "This is a system name ⚠️

You cannot create a topic named Deleted messages.
Please choose another name."
    : "Topic created ✅
📁 " + $json.topic_title +
      "

Saved messages: " + $json.saved_count +
      "
Total messages: " + $json.user_all_messages
}}

parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    '{{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS topic_title,
    {{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.from.id }}::BIGINT AS user_id
),

reserved_name AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN LOWER(TRIM(topic_title)) IN ('deleted_messages', 'deleted messages') THEN TRUE
      ELSE FALSE
    END AS is_reserved
  FROM input_data
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (title, user_id, removable)
  SELECT
    topic_title,
    user_id,
    TRUE
  FROM input_data
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM reserved_name WHERE is_reserved = TRUE)
  ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id, title, user_id, removable
),

existing AS (
  SELECT t.id, t.title, t.user_id, t.removable
  FROM gnote.topics t
  JOIN input_data i
    ON i.user_id = t.user_id
   AND LOWER(t.title) = LOWER(i.topic_title)
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM reserved_name WHERE is_reserved = TRUE)
  LIMIT 1
),

clear_state AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.user_state
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
),

result_topic AS (
  SELECT * FROM inserted
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM existing
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT
  rt.id,
  rt.title,
  rt.user_id,
  rt.removable,
  (SELECT is_reserved FROM reserved_name) AS is_reserved_name
FROM result_topic rt

UNION ALL

SELECT
  NULL::BIGINT AS id,
  'Deleted messages'::TEXT AS title,
  (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)::BIGINT AS user_id,
  FALSE AS removable,
  TRUE AS is_reserved_name
WHERE (SELECT is_reserved FROM reserved_name) = TRUE;

WITH upsert_user AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.users (
    id,
    name,
    first_visit,
    last_visit,
    all_messages
  )
  VALUES (
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    '{{ ($json.user_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    NOW(),
    NOW(),
    0
  )
  ON CONFLICT (id)
  DO UPDATE SET
    name = EXCLUDED.name,
    last_visit = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),

ensure_deleted_topic AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (title, user_id, removable)
  SELECT
    'Deleted messages',
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    FALSE
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM gnote.topics
    WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
      AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
  RETURNING id
),

protect_deleted_topic AS (
  UPDATE gnote.topics
  SET removable = FALSE
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  RETURNING id
),

insert_pending AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.pending_messages (
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption
  )
  VALUES (
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    '{{ ($json.content || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    NOW(),
    '{{ ($json.message_type || "text").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.file_id ? "'" + $json.file_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.file_unique_id ? "'" + $json.file_unique_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.file_name ? "'" + $json.file_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.mime_type ? "'" + $json.mime_type.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.caption ? "'" + $json.caption.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}
  )
  RETURNING
    id,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption
)

SELECT *
FROM insert_pending;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  LIMIT 1
),

moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING
    id AS pending_id,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    {{ $json.topic_id }},
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url
  FROM moved
  RETURNING
    id,
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
),

stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_all_messages
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
)

SELECT
  stats.saved_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.topic_id }}::BIGINT AS topic_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.callback_query_id }}' AS callback_query_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT title FROM selected_topic), '') AS topic_title,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages
FROM stats;

WITH blocked AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.chat.id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS topic_title,
    {{ $json.is_reserved_name ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}::BOOLEAN AS is_reserved_name
),

moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND {{ $json.id ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}
    AND NOT {{ $json.is_reserved_name ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}
  RETURNING
    id AS pending_id,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    deleted_at
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    {{ $json.id || 0 }},
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url,
    NULL
  FROM moved
  RETURNING id
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_all_messages
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
)

SELECT
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.id || 0 }}::BIGINT AS topic_id,
  {{ $("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message.chat.id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS topic_title,
  {{ $json.is_reserved_name ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}::BOOLEAN AS is_reserved_name,
  (SELECT saved_count FROM stats) AS saved_count,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages;

parameters.content:
Main Event Router

This block receives all incoming Telegram updates and routes them by event type.
- `message` — regular user text message
- `callback_query` — inline keyboard button click

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
  AND (
    m.deleted_at IS NULL
    OR LOWER(t.title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
WHERE t.user_id = {{ $json.message?.from?.id || $json.callback_query?.from?.id }}
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN LOWER(t.title) = 'deleted messages' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
  t.title ASC;

SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
  AND (
    m.deleted_at IS NULL
    OR LOWER(t.title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
WHERE t.user_id = {{ $json.message?.from?.id || $json.callback_query?.from?.id }}
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN LOWER(t.title) = 'deleted messages' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
  t.title ASC;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  LIMIT 1
),

messages_list AS (
  SELECT
    m.id,
    m.content,
    m.created_at,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_id,
    m.file_unique_id,
    m.file_name,
    m.mime_type,
    m.caption,
    m.telegram_file_path,
    m.file_url,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC) AS message_number,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count
  FROM gnote.messages m
  JOIN selected_topic st
    ON st.id = m.topic_id
   AND st.user_id = m.user_id
  ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC
),

result_messages AS (
  SELECT
    ml.*,
    st.title AS topic_title,
    st.id AS topic_id
  FROM messages_list ml
  CROSS JOIN selected_topic st
),

empty_result AS (
  SELECT
    NULL::BIGINT AS id,
    NULL::TEXT AS content,
    NULL::TIMESTAMP AS created_at,
    'empty'::TEXT AS message_type,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_id,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_unique_id,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_name,
    NULL::TEXT AS mime_type,
    NULL::TEXT AS caption,
    NULL::TEXT AS telegram_file_path,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_url,
    0::BIGINT AS message_number,
    0::BIGINT AS total_count,
    st.title AS topic_title,
    st.id AS topic_id
  FROM selected_topic st
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM messages_list)
)

SELECT
  *,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.callback_query_id }}' AS callback_query_id
FROM result_messages

UNION ALL

SELECT
  *,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.callback_query_id }}' AS callback_query_id
FROM empty_result;

SELECT
  m.id,
  m.user_id,
  m.topic_id,
  m.content,
  m.created_at,
  m.message_type,
  m.file_id,
  m.file_unique_id,
  m.file_name,
  m.mime_type,
  m.caption,
  t.title AS topic_title,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  '{{ $json.callback_query_id }}' AS callback_query_id
FROM gnote.messages m
JOIN gnote.topics t
  ON t.id = m.topic_id
 AND t.user_id = m.user_id
WHERE m.id = {{ $json.message_id }}
  AND m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  AND m.file_id IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
  AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE t.user_id = {{ $json.message.from.id }}
  AND t.removable = TRUE
  AND LOWER(t.title) <> 'deleted_messages'
GROUP BY t.id, t.title
ORDER BY t.title ASC;

SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  t.removable,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
  AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE t.id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
  AND t.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  AND t.removable = TRUE
  AND LOWER(t.title) <> 'deleted_messages'
GROUP BY t.id, t.title, t.removable;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND removable = TRUE
    AND LOWER(title) <> 'deleted messages'
  LIMIT 1
),

ensure_deleted_topic AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (title, user_id, removable)
  SELECT
    'Deleted messages',
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    FALSE
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM gnote.topics
    WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
      AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
  RETURNING id
),

protect_deleted_topic AS (
  UPDATE gnote.topics
  SET removable = FALSE
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  RETURNING id
),

target_deleted_topic AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  LIMIT 1
),

moved AS (
  UPDATE gnote.messages m
  SET
    topic_id = (SELECT id FROM target_deleted_topic),
    deleted_at = NOW()
  WHERE m.topic_id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING m.id
),

deleted_original_topic AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.topics t
  WHERE t.id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND t.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND t.removable = TRUE
    AND LOWER(t.title) <> 'deleted messages'
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING t.id, t.title
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS moved_count
  FROM moved
)

SELECT
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT title FROM selected_topic), '') AS topic_title,
  (SELECT moved_count FROM stats) AS moved_count,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deleted_original_topic) AS topic_deleted;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND removable = TRUE
    AND LOWER(title) <> 'deleted_messages'
  LIMIT 1
),

messages_list AS (
  SELECT
    m.id,
    m.content,
    m.created_at,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_id,
    m.file_unique_id,
    m.file_name,
    m.mime_type,
    m.caption,
    m.telegram_file_path,
    m.file_url,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC) AS message_number,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count
  FROM gnote.messages m
  JOIN selected_topic st
    ON st.id = m.topic_id
   AND st.user_id = m.user_id
  WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL
  ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC
),

result_messages AS (
  SELECT
    ml.*,
    st.title AS topic_title,
    st.id AS topic_id
  FROM messages_list ml
  CROSS JOIN selected_topic st
),

empty_result AS (
  SELECT
    NULL::BIGINT AS id,
    NULL::TEXT AS content,
    NULL::TIMESTAMP AS created_at,
    'empty'::TEXT AS message_type,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_id,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_unique_id,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_name,
    NULL::TEXT AS mime_type,
    NULL::TEXT AS caption,
    NULL::TEXT AS telegram_file_path,
    NULL::TEXT AS file_url,
    0::BIGINT AS message_number,
    0::BIGINT AS total_count,
    st.title AS topic_title,
    st.id AS topic_id
  FROM selected_topic st
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM messages_list)
)

SELECT
  *,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
FROM result_messages

UNION ALL

SELECT
  *,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
FROM empty_result;

WITH selected_message AS (
  SELECT m.*
  FROM gnote.messages m
  JOIN gnote.topics t
    ON t.id = m.topic_id
   AND t.user_id = m.user_id
  WHERE m.id = {{ $json.message_id }}
    AND m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND t.removable = TRUE
    AND LOWER(t.title) <> 'deleted messages'
  LIMIT 1
),

ensure_deleted_topic AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (title, user_id, removable)
  SELECT
    'Deleted messages',
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    FALSE
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM gnote.topics
    WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
      AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  )
  RETURNING id
),

protect_deleted_topic AS (
  UPDATE gnote.topics
  SET removable = FALSE
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  RETURNING id
),

target_deleted_topic AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND LOWER(title) = 'deleted messages'
  LIMIT 1
),

moved AS (
  UPDATE gnote.messages m
  SET
    topic_id = (SELECT id FROM target_deleted_topic),
    deleted_at = NOW()
  WHERE m.id = {{ $json.message_id }}
    AND m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_message)
  RETURNING m.id
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS moved_count
  FROM moved
)

SELECT
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  (SELECT moved_count FROM stats) AS moved_count;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    '{{ $json.topic_title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS topic_title,
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.topics (title, user_id, removable)
  SELECT
    topic_title,
    user_id,
    TRUE
  FROM input_data
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(topic_title)) NOT IN ('deleted messages', 'deleted_messages')
  ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id, title, user_id
),

existing AS (
  SELECT t.id, t.title, t.user_id
  FROM gnote.topics t
  JOIN input_data i
    ON i.user_id = t.user_id
   AND LOWER(t.title) = LOWER(i.topic_title)
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(i.topic_title)) NOT IN ('deleted messages', 'deleted_messages')
  LIMIT 1
),

result_topic AS (
  SELECT * FROM inserted
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM existing
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT
  rt.id AS topic_id,
  rt.title AS topic_title,
  rt.user_id,
  (SELECT chat_id FROM input_data) AS chat_id
FROM result_topic rt;

WITH selected_topic AS (
  SELECT id, title, user_id
  FROM gnote.topics
  WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
    AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  LIMIT 1
),

moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_topic)
  RETURNING
    id AS pending_id,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    {{ $json.topic_id }},
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url
  FROM moved
  RETURNING id
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_all_messages
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
)

SELECT
  stats.saved_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.topic_id }}::BIGINT AS topic_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT title FROM selected_topic), '') AS topic_title,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages
FROM stats;
